enrichment.summary: Kyle records a pre-ride vlog from Boulder, recapping a previous day's ride that was cut short by rain and a detour to help his mom move her office. He plans a ride up Linden and possibly into Fourmile Canyon, notes he's been listening to music while riding, and mentions he'll stop using weed soon which will shift him back to talking-style videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: loves it — handles washboard dirt roads exceptionally well
currently doing it and enjoying it
running out in about a week and plans to quit, expects it will make him more efficient and return to talking-style videos

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: This is my new strategy of doing the video when I get up before going on my ride.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday, I wanted to go up to Goldhill from Lick's skillet from the north but turned around.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I then wanted to go up Linden but it started raining, so I turned around and went the other way.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wanted to go beyond Hungry but didn't feel like getting a power bar, so I came up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went over to my mom's house and helped her for a few hours with moving her office.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to help my mom consolidate her office today but will go on a quick ride first.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I'll go up Linden and see if the road in the Linden area is open.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: After that, I might ride down into Formal can, which has a lot of dirt roads.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My bike is really good on dirt roads; it's an Eddie Marx model Rank 69.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My bike is the endurance bike site with a longer top tube, making it better for rough terrain.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was riding down washboard when I went up James Cannon, and it was totally smooth.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I love that bike because it handles rough terrain amazingly well.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today, I think I'll listen to music again while riding.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm really stoned right now but will run out of weed in about a week.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll quit weed soon, which will make me more efficient.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll stop listening to music and start doing more talking in my videos.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There's enough talking for now in my videos.
